rom.versionHint: Pokemon Unbound v2.1.1.1 (FireRed base header BPRE)

notes: Species names and base stats are extracted directly from the ROM.
Held item names are resolved where the ROM-backed held-item block has been decoded.
Move names and battle metadata are extracted directly from the ROM.
A few bytes remain unlabeled and are exported as raw extras.
Ability names are extracted directly from the ROM.
A confirmed held-item name block was decoded from the ROM.
Only that resolved range is exported so far.
Evolution method tables have not been decoded yet.
Level-up learnsets are extracted directly from the ROM.
Egg moves and TM compatibility are not decoded yet.
